title: XOR scrambles the numbers — the cipher hides in the bits
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — letters as numbers, before and after XOR ---
def __plot(message, key):
    plain = [[i, ord(c)] for i, c in enumerate(message)]
    cipher = [[i, ord(c) ^ key] for i, c in enumerate(message)]
    return [
        {"name": "after XOR (the cipher)", "points": cipher, "highlight": True},
        {"name": "plain letters (as numbers)", "points": plain, "highlight": False},
    ]
